working_on.task: Completed CarFloat rebranding, 8-language i18n, and custom icon integration
working_on.notes: Major milestone: project renamed to CarFloat with full multi-language support and deep-linked system settings.

pending_tasks.task: Test on physical car head unit for Boot reliability
pending_tasks.notes: Emulator does not fully simulate diverse OEM boot behaviors.

recent_changes.description: Renamed project to CarFloat, integrated user's custom PNG icon, implemented 8-language i18n system with runtime switcher.
Added deep-link click actions to WiFi/BT/GPS icons, long-press clock support, and widget visibility toggles.

errors_encountered.solution: Manually added missing string keys to all locale strings.xml files (sed script missed the default values/ folder).
Added a small delay (200ms) before recreate() to ensure DataStore preference is fully written and prevents race conditions.

decisions_made.reason: Maximum compatibility for automotive head units that may not support VectorDrawables for launch icons.
Allows the app to ignore system language and use a specific user preference without needing a restart in most cases (activity recreate handles UI refresh).
